notes: Simple case: single BookStore entity. No separate building-as-Place because no historic-building continuity is established from a primary source at time of writing.

@graph.name: Kinderhook Books
@graph.description: Independent bookseller in the Village of Kinderhook. Books and bookish gifts.
@graph.kh:affectiveRegister: A village bookseller in the old sense of the phrase — walkable, browsable, knowing.
